zh.Westhall, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可維斯塔爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Artys於1530年出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Jacobi Artys30歲，母親Artys Artis29歲。他於1565年與Judith Elizabetha Wylley在英國素福爾可維斯塔爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1621年在英國素福爾可丹寧頓享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Artys于1530年出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Jacobi Artys30岁，母亲Artys Artis29岁。他于1565年与Judith Elizabetha Wylley在英国素福爾可維斯塔爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1621年在英国素福爾可丹寧頓享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Artys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and German: from a medieval variant of the personal name   Arthur  .

variants.name: Arthur
meanings: Scottish, Irish, English, German, and French: from the ancient Celtic personal name Arthur. The origin of the name is disputed, but it may be derived from the Latin name Artorius, or it may derive from an old Celtic word meaning ‘bear’ (compare Gaelic art, Welsh arth, both of which mean ‘bear’). It has been in regular use as a personal name in Britain since the early Middle Ages, owing its popularity in large part to the legendary exploits of King Arthur, which gave rise to a prolific literature in Welsh, French, English, German, and other languages. In many cases this is a shortened form of Scottish or Irish McArthur , the patronymic Mac- often being dropped in the 17th, 18th, and 19th centuries under English influence.
West African (Ghana): Anglicized form of the Akan (Fante) name   Atta  .
History: President Chester Alan Arthur (1830–86) was the son of a VT Baptist preacher, William Arthur (1797–1875), who emigrated from Ballymena in northern Ireland c. 1815.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Artys was born in 1530, in Suffolk, England, his father, Jacobi Artys, was 30 and his mother, Artys Artis, was 29. He married Judith Elizabetha Wylley in 1565, in Westhall, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1621, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Artys est né en 1530, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Jacobi Artys, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Artys Artis, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Judith Elizabetha Wylley en 1565, à Westhall, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1621, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Artys 1530 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jacobi Artys 30 und seine Mutter Artys Artis 29. Er hat 1565 in Westhall, Suffolk, England Judith Elizabetha Wylley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1621 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Dennington, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Artys è nato il nel 1530 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Jacobi Artys, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Artys Artis, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Judith Elizabetha Wylley nel 1565, nel Westhall, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1621, nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Artysが1530年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Jacobi Artysは30歳，母Artys Artisは29歳であった。1565年にイギリススフォルクウエスサルでJudith Elizabetha Wylleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1621年にイギリススフォルクデニントンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Artys(이)가 1530년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jacobi Artys(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Artys Artis(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1565년 영국 수폴크 웨스솔에서 Judith Elizabetha Wylley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1621년 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Artys nasceu em 1530, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Jacobi Artys, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Artys Artis, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Elizabetha Wylley em 1565, em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1621, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Artys родился в 1530 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Jacobi Artys было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Artys Artis, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Elizabetha Wylley в 1565 г. в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1621 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Artys nació en 1530, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Jacobi Artys, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Artys Artis, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Judith Elizabetha Wylley en 1565, en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1621, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 91 años.
